title: Trainings — Special Workshops
content:
Special Workshops are one-off, deep-dive training events hosted by ORA on specific research administration topics. Unlike the recurring Monthly D-RED Seminars, Special Workshops are scheduled as needed, often combining multiple presenters into a single half-day or full-day session focused on one theme.

Documented workshop on this page:

Cost Allowability Workshop — Held December 9, 2022. This workshop included four sequential presentations:
1) 'Cost Allowability Principles & Examples' — Presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD
2) 'Budget Info in the Funding Opportunity Announcement (FOA)' — Presented by Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH
3) 'Understanding Federal Notices of Award' — Presented by Becca Steiner
4) 'Cost Allowability, Processes & Support Documents' — Presented by Lucy Manyara, MBA and Shamon Shine-Lee

The page itself does not enumerate registration procedures, future workshop schedules, or full external PDF/PowerPoint URLs (only relative document paths are referenced for slide decks).

To inquire about upcoming Special Workshops or request a workshop on a specific topic, contact: Office of Research Administration, Tyler Hall, Student Service Bldg, Suite 304, Baltimore, MD 21251. Phone 443-885-4044. Fax 443-885-8280. Email ask.ora@morgan.edu.

Additional details revealed by Playwright: All four Cost Allowability Workshop presentation slide decks have direct PDF URLs on morgan.edu under /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Workshops/: (1) Cost Allowability Principles & Examples (Kamangar) — 2022-12-09_Cost_Allowability.pdf; (2) Budget Info in the FOA (Silver) — 2022-12-09_Budget_Info_in_the_FOA.pdf; (3) Understanding Federal Notices of Award (Steiner) — 2022-12-09_Understanding_Federal_Notices_of_Award.pdf; (4) Cost Allowability, Processes & Support Documents (Manyara/Shine-Lee) — 2022-12-09_Cost_Allowability_Support_Documents.pdf. The page has no other archived workshops as of 2026-05-14; the Cost Allowability workshop remains the sole documented Special Workshop.
